title: Bloemfontein court jails man who ‘lost his temper’ and killed his child
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Bloemfontein Regional Court has sentenced a 29-year-old man to 20 years’ imprisonment for the murder of his son in 2023.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Bloemfontein Regional Court has sentenced a 29-year-old man to 20 years’ imprisonment for the murder of his son in 2023."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Bloemfontein Courant, Free State police spokesperson Thabo Covane explains that the incident occurred while the perpetrator was bathing his six-year-old son.","html":"According to Bloemfontein Courant, Free State police spokesperson Thabo Covane explains that the incident occurred while the perpetrator was bathing his six-year-old son."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“[The man] lost his temper and started assaulting the young boy with open hands and clenched fists in full view of his 14-year-old brother,” Covane says.","html":"“[The man] lost his temper and started assaulting the young boy with open hands and clenched fists in full view of his 14-year-old brother,” Covane says."},{"type":"heading","text":"Fatal assault","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He adds that the brother left for school while the father continued beating the victim. When the brother returned home, he found the victim lying motionless on the green couch, not breathing.","html":"He adds that the brother left for school while the father continued beating the victim. When the brother returned home, he found the victim lying motionless on the green couch, not breathing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police and medical services were contacted and the victim was declared dead on the scene. A case of murder was opened.","html":"Police and medical services were contacted and the victim was declared dead on the scene. A case of murder was opened."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The identity of the father is withheld to protect the minor witness.","html":"The identity of the father is withheld to protect the minor witness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Bloemfontein court jails man who ‘lost his temper’ and killed his child
